src: Repo for the papers "Intrinsic Image Decomposition via Ordinal Shading" (TOG 2023) and "Colorful Diffuse Intrinsic Image Decomposition in the Wild" (TOG 2024)
ja: 論文「Intrinsic Image Decomposition via Ordinal Shading」(TOG 2023)および「Colorful Diffuse Intrinsic Image Decomposition in the Wild」(TOG 2024)のリポジトリ
